name: verifySearchValidationWhenMandatoryFieldsEmpty

statusDetails.message: Search should be blocked and the user kept on the same search form when mandatory fields are empty. expected [https://www.flighthub.com/travel-packages] but found [https://www.flighthub.com/flight/search?seg0_from=CAI&seg0_to=LAX&seg1_to=CAI&seg1_from=LAX&seg0_date=2026-09-18&seg1_date=2026-09-29&order_by=cheapest&currency=cad&num_adults=1&num_children=0&num_infants=0&num_infants_lap=0&type=roundtrip&seat_class=Economy]
